summary: Both REQ-16 and REQ-17 appear to be substantially implemented. App.tsx has been rewritten with synchronous localStorage checks and AuthGuard/LoginGuard components. Inventory.tsx has been rewritten with per-field validation, mutateAsync, query invalidation, and toast notifications. There is a potential partial gap in REQ-16 regarding the no-flicker AC, as the redirect uses useEffect rather than a true synchronous before-mount mechanism, though the guard does return null synchronously when unauthenticated.

missing_requirements.requirement: No flicker or momentary render of a protected page before redirect — redirect must happen before mounting any protected page component
missing_requirements.reason: AuthGuard uses useEffect to trigger navigation, which fires after the component renders. While the guard returns null synchronously when isAuth is false (preventing protected children from rendering), the navigate call inside useEffect is inherently asynchronous and does not constitute a true before-mount redirect. This partially violates the AC requiring zero flicker or momentary render before redirect.
